title: Telangana braces for thunderstorms as June begins; heatwave to ease gradually - Dailyhunt
full_text:
HYDERABAD: Scattered thunderstorms are likely across several districts of Telangana on June 1, 2026, while heatwave conditions are expected to gradually ease from Monday, according to the day's weather forecast.
The report indicates thunderstorm activity during the evening and night hours in multiple districts, including parts of Greater Hyderabad. The copy follows newsroom principles of brevity, clarity and active voice.
Thunderstorms likely in several districts
Scattered thunderstorms are forecast in Vikarabad, Sangareddy, Medak, Rangareddy, Siddipet, Yadadri Bhuvanagiri, Nalgonda, Mahabubabad, Bhadradri Kothagudem, Khammam, Adilabad, Komaram Bheem Asifabad, Nirmal, Nizamabad, Jagtial, Mancherial and Kamareddy districts during the evening and night.
Other parts of Telangana are expected to receive only isolated rainfall.
Hyderabad may see evening thunderstorm activity
Hyderabad is likely to remain dry until evening, after which scattered thunderstorms may occur in a few parts of the city during the evening and night.
The forecast suggests a gradual reduction in heatwave intensity across Telangana from June 1.
Temperatures to remain high in northern Telangana
Despite the expected easing of heatwave conditions, temperatures are likely to remain elevated over the next two days.
North-eastern Telangana is expected to record maximum temperatures between 41°C and 43°C, while Hyderabad may see temperatures ranging from 39°C to 41°C.
